zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin於1445年10月25日出生在英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓時，他的父親Sir William Bourchier39歲，母親Thomasine Hankeford22歲。他於1466年與Elizabeth Dinham在英國艾可斯坦斯泰德 維利亞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1479年9月18日享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文巴普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin于1445年10月25日出生在英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓时，他的父亲Sir William Bourchier39岁，母亲Thomasine Hankeford22岁。他于1466年与Elizabeth Dinham在英国艾可斯坦斯泰德 維利亞结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1479年9月18日享年33岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文巴普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bourchier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: perhaps a variant of   Burcher   (  see  Bircher  ). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2). The name has sometimes been altered to or confused with   Bouchier   and   Boucher  .

2 Norman, English: locative name of uncertain origin but it is presumably from a French place-name, perhaps Boursières in Haute-Saône. The name was early confused with other surnames and may survive in Bouchier, Bowcher, Bowser, and Boozer . The surname gave rise to a number of minor place-names in Essex: Bourchier’s alias Bouchier’s Hall in Aldham, Bourchier’s Hall in Messing; Bouchier’s Grange in Great Coggeshall, Bouchiers Chapel in Tollesbury, Boarstye Fm and Bowser’s Hall in Rivenhall (Essex), and Boose’s Green in Colne Engayne.

variants.name: Bourcier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Lucien, Armand, Emile.
French: variant of   Boursier   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The (majority of the) American bearers of the surname Bourcier are descendants of Jean Boursier dit Lavigne from France (see Boursier ).

variants.name: Bircher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Albrecht, Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ulrich.
South German and Swiss German: topographic name for someone who lived by a birch tree or in a birch wood, from Middle High German birche ‘birch’ + the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant.
English: habitational name from Birchover in Derbyshire or Bircher in Hereford, both named as from Old English birce ‘birch’ + ofer ‘ridge’.

variants.name: Bouchier
meanings: 1  English: variant of   Butcher  .
2  English: alternatively a variant of   Belcher  .
3  Norman, English: possibly a variant of   Bourchier   (2).

variants.name: Bowser
meanings: English: nickname from either from Old French beu cher ‘good company’, or from Old French beu sire ‘fair sir’ (see Belcher ), given either to a fine gentleman (perhaps ironically), or to someone who made frequent use of this term of address. Compare Bonser and Boozer .
English: variant of   Bolsover  .
Americanized form of German   Bauser  .

variants.name: Boozer
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German   Buser  .
English (Kent): variant of   Bowser   1.

variants.name: Burcher
meanings: English: variant of   Bircher  .

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Borger
meanings: North German (also Börger) and Dutch: variant of Burger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from Yiddish borger ‘borrower’ or ‘lender’.
Norwegian and Swedish: habitational name for someone from a place called Borg (see   Borg  ), or a topographic name for someone living by a fortification or near a hill resembling a fortification.

nameMeanings.name: Fulke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin was born on 25 October 1445, in Little Easton, Essex, England, his father, Sir William Bourchier, was 39 and his mother, Thomasine Hankeford, was 22. He married Elizabeth Dinham in 1466, in Stansted Village, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 18 September 1479, at the age of 33, and was buried in Bampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin est né le 25 octobre 1445, à Little Easton, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Bourchier, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Hankeford, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Dinham en 1466, à Stansted Village, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 septembre 1479, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarinが1445年10月25日にイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンで生まれた時，父Sir William Bourchierは39歳，母Thomasine Hankefordは22歳であった。1466年にイギリスエセックススタンステド ヴィラッジでElizabeth Dinhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1479年9月18日に33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンバンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Clifford in Dunsford, Combeinteignhead,: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코브 인 테익헤드
ko.lifeSummary: Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin(이)가 1445년 10월 25일 영국 에세스 리틀 이스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Bourchier(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasine Hankeford(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1466년 영국 에세스 스탠스테드 비라지에서 Elizabeth Dinham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 9월 18일 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 바프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.Clifford in Dunsford, Combeinteignhead,: Combe in Teignhead, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin nasceu em 25 de outubro de 1445, em Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Bourchier, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Hankeford, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Dinham em 1466, em Stansted Village, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1479, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Clifford in Dunsford, Combeinteignhead,: комб ин тиинид, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin родился 25 октября 1445 г. в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Bourchier было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Hankeford, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Dinham в 1466 г. в местности станстед вилладж, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 18 сентября 1479 г. в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности бамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elizabeth Dinham en 1466, en Stansted Village, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
